sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76" key="a)belte/reios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀβελτέρειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, lengthd. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀβέλτερος,</foreign> as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμετέρειος</foreign> for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμέτερος,</foreign> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.137</biblScope> </bibl>; prob. (for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ίου</foreign>) in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope> </bibl> (Dind.).</entryFree>
